en: I don't understand why you're completely disregarding your signature color.
ko: 왜 당신의 시그니처 색깔을 완전히 무시하는지 이해할 수 없어요.

en: He's proposing. I can't look like I would on any other date.
ko: 그가 청혼하고 있어요. 다른 데이트처럼 보일 수는 없어요.

en: This is the date. The night I'll always remember.
I want to look special. Bridal.
But not like I expect anything. There's nothing I love more than a dumb blonde with daddy's plastic.
You know he gets excited when he meets people. Did you see this one? We just got it in yesterday.
Yes, of course. With a half-loop topstitching on the hem? Absolutely.
It's impossible to use a half-loop topstitching on low-viscosity rayon.
ko: 저점도 레이온에 반 루프 스티치를 사용하는 건 불가능해요.

en: It would snag the fabric. And you didn't just get it in.
I saw it in a junebug a year ago. So if you're trying to sell it to me for full price, you picked the wrong girl.
In a few hours, I'll be the future Mrs. Warner Huntington III.
ko: 몇 시간 후면 나는 미래의 미세스가 될 거예요.
